channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Feature flags to experimentation: 9 platforms compared
item.description: 9 flag platforms compared: latency, cost, offline resilience — pick the one that won’t break on 2G. Save $400/month and keep experiments running when the carrier drops packets.

item.title: MCP errors: why servers go quiet in 2026
item.description: Cut MCP 204 errors 90% with keep-alive headers and 60s timeouts — connection pooling, CDN traps, and the $40 DigitalOcean fix most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: Freelance rates halved by AI tools
item.description: Freelance developer rates halved in 2026—see the exact math behind the crash, plus outcome-based pricing templates and AI lift benchmarks that prove it.

item.title: Spot AI’s hidden cost spike in your stack
item.description: Protect your salary from AI automation by mastering 3 skills — cache hit ratios, connection pools, and environment rewrites — before the bill spikes 300 % and the CFO calls.

item.title: Survive AI SaaS disruption in 2026
item.description: Find a SaaS niche immune to AI disruption — local regulation, offline constraints, and incumbents’ blind spots. PowerRec went from zero to 1,200 merchants by targeting Kenya Power receipts.

item.title: Migrations? Stop running them live
item.description: Cut migration downtime 70% by versioning schemas before deploy — concrete patterns from 3 outages and 18 months of metrics.

item.title: AI scanners find vulns: what actually works
item.description: AI scanners catch 42% more vulnerabilities than static analysis alone — but only when paired with a 200-line policy file and threat context. Learn which tools work, which numbers matter, and the exact commands to ship in 2026.

item.title: AI agents vs Argo, Tekton: which pipeline heals itself?
item.description: Self-healing pipelines 2026: Argo Workflows vs Tekton — 23% latency gap, 98% agent speed difference, and the tuning mistake that cost $1,620

item.title: Stop SBOM surprises: Syft 1.10 in CI/CD
item.description: Cut compliance risk 100% with Syft 1.10 SBOMs in CI/CD — fail builds on new CVEs, attach SPDX files to releases, and run for $0.04 per build.

item.title: AI agent memory: context that survives restarts
item.description: Persist AI agent context across restarts with Redis 7.2 and langgraph 0.2.14 — flush writes, raise liveness probes, and stop losing sessions after a crash or rollout.

item.title: Saved $3k/month by ditching Kubernetes
item.description: Cut AWS costs 93% from $3k to $200/month — single EC2, Lambda, RDS Proxy, and the mistakes most teams repeat when downsizing Kubernetes

item.title: Negotiate salaries with AI skills in 2026
item.description: Negotiate 20% higher salaries in 2026 by filtering AI-automated roles — Python 3.11 scraper, 1,200 job data, human-skills premium table

item.title: AI codebase onboarding: ship fast or ship safe?
item.description: Cut onboarding time 40% with AI codebases — guardrails that work, benchmarks, and the $48k/year incident savings most teams miss.

item.title: Grew $5k MRR on a $29 VPS
item.description: Hit $5k MRR without ads or a team — the exact stack, conversion targets, and mistakes I made in 2026 that saved $1,800 on referral programs and cut churn from 18% to 6%.

item.title: Slay false positives in CI scans
item.description: Cut security scan noise 89% in CI — real numbers from 87 repos, scanner versions, and the ignore-patterns.yaml template that finally worked.

item.title: AI ops tools: what oncall actually needs
item.description: Cut oncall pages 55% with the right AI ops tool — PagerDuty AIOps vs Datadog Incident+AI in production, with latency, cost, and tuning data for 2026 stacks.

item.title: Monolith to services without a rewrite
item.description: Cut API response time 20% by decoupling first—database-first refactor beats service extraction for most teams in 2026.

item.title: WCAG chatbots miss: aria-live traps in AI UIs
item.description: If there’s a delay of more than 200ms between a token arriving and the announcement, the user experience will feel sluggish.

item.title: Batteries-included offline mode for unreliable networks
item.description: Cut data loss 98% with offline-first CRDT sync in unreliable networks — Yjs 13.6, IndexedDB compaction, and the battery guard most teams skip

item.title: Use-based pricing for dev tools in 2026
item.description: Cut pricing churn 38% by switching to usage-based billing — learn from three SE Asia startups that grew from 0 to 100k users on lean infra. Real numbers, real mistakes, real Stripe setup.
